mapper.insert: INSERT INTO events (id, name, date, capacity, half_price_limit, details, location, ticket_price) VALUES (#{id}, #{name}, #{date}, #{capacity}, #{halfPriceLimit}, #{details}, #{location}, #{ticketPrice})
mapper.select: SELECT id, name, date, capacity, half_price_limit, details, location, ticket_price FROM events
mapper.update: UPDATE events SET name = #{name}, date = #{date}, capacity = #{capacity}, half_price_limit = #{halfPriceLimit}, details = #{details}, location = #{location}, ticket_price = #{ticketPrice} WHERE id = #{id}
